name: zalo-bot-free
description: Zalo Standalone Bot with AI capabilities- bot zalo free

scripts.check:session: node -e "import('./src/session-store.js').then(async s=>{const data=await s.loadSession(); console.log(JSON.stringify({hasSession:!!data, imei:!!data?.imei, userAgent:!!data?.userAgent, language:data?.language||null, cookieCount:data?.cookie?.length||0, savedAt:data?.savedAt||null}, null, 2));})"
